creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Thanks, +1

Sorry if the @ in the first line of comment 0 confuses anyone. 

He so often signed himself as hps, I forgot that it was not his FreeBSD username.

(It's hps@ at <https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=urndis&sektion=4&manpath=freebsd-release#AUTHORS>, that might have been a typo.)
